summary: Per-message engagement tracking signals feature tested successfully. Backend enriches timeline events with opens/clicks from email_tracking collection. Frontend displays inline badges (Opened, Opened Nx, Link clicked) on athlete's sent messages. All test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ConversationBubble.js EngagementSignals component (lines 15-37): Correctly shows badges only when opens > 0 or clicks > 0
Badge text logic correct: opens=1 shows 'Opened', opens>1 shows 'Opened Nx'
Badge only rendered on isRight bubbles (line 171): ensures coach messages don't show engagement signals
athlete_dashboard.py journey endpoint (lines 469-479): Correctly enriches timeline with email_tracking data
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded email_tracking docs: msg-de6804c3 (3 opens, 1 click), msg-2e7d7b6f (2 opens), msg-296b29f4 (1 open, 1 click)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-message engagement tracking feature complete. data-testid selectors: engagement-signals (wrapper), signal-opened (opened badge), signal-clicked (clicked badge). Stanford journey has 3 athlete messages with tracking data and 3 coach messages without. LOGIN: Fill credentials and press Enter.

backend_api: GET /api/athlete/programs/{id}/journey returns opens and clicks fields on timeline events - PASSED
Athlete messages have opens/clicks populated from email_tracking collection - PASSED
Coach messages have opens=0, clicks=0 (no tracking data) - PASSED
